original_statement: if you wanted to make a sound movie which film would you chose to use?
mutated_statement: if you wanted to do something a something which something would you chose to use?
mutation_analysis: 词汇泛化 + 动词替换 + 语法扭曲/插入: 具体名词/形容词被替换为占位词"something"（sound movie、film等被泛化） | "make" → "do"（动词替换） | 错误插入冠词"a"并产生重复占位词导致结构扭曲 (make a sound movie which film → do something a something which something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述（“The table includes one entry explicitly labeled for slide duplication: 'kodak color print material | type d (slide duping film) | 1955–1957'”以及“the appropriate choice is this Type D slide duping film”和“Prediction Answer matches this entry”），可以识别出Agent直接把任务当作明确的“slide duping”问题来处理。具体表现为：Agent 没有在judge_thought或任何批评中提及问题的模糊性或不确定性，也未请求澄清，而是选定并返回了一个具体条目（kodak type d slide duping film）。因为行为完全按照自己的理解直接给出具体答案、且没有任何表示不确定或要求更多信息的措辞，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
